metadata.description: Multi-stack design-spec-driven workflow skills for Claude Code: stack-neutral Adapter Plan + Flutter and Next.js/Tailwind reference adapters; discovery, compose, sequence, ship; status/promote/atlas-save productivity helpers; 12 atomic theme/critique/refine/copy/mockup/tweaks operators (interactive mockup stage shipped in v1.4); flow audit (v1.5.1), cross-session elicitation ledger + opus-execute Sonnet worker (v1.5.2); caveman ultra-compressed communication suite (v1.5.3).

plugins.name: design-workflow
plugins.description: Full design-spec-driven pipeline — Júri discovery + critique (Nielsen 10 + 5dim radar), compose/sequence/ship orchestrators, productivity helpers (pause/resume/status/approve, status, promote, atlas-save), 12 atomic operators (theme audit/create/extend/port, bolder/quieter/distill, motion, frontend-design, ux-writing, tweaks), and caveman communication suite (caveman, cavecrew, caveman-commit/compress/help/review/stats).
